SEARCH
Package com.example.cmput301_app.model

Class Organizer

java.lang.Object
com.example.cmput301_app.model.Profile
com.example.cmput301_app.model.Organizer
public class Organizer extends Profile
Represents an organizer in the application. Extends Profile to inherit common user identity fields such as name, email, phone number, device ID, geolocation, and profile image. An organizer is a user who can create and manage events, upload posters, run lottery draws, and send notifications to entrants. Event-specific settings such as geolocation requirements, waiting list limits, and attendee caps are stored on the Event class rather than here, as these settings are per-event and not global to the organizer. Outstanding issues: - Organizer role verification against Firebase is handled by OrganizerDB, not this class.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Organizer()
    Default no-argument constructor required for Firebase deserialization.
    Organizer(String deviceId, String name, String email, String phoneNumber)
    Constructs an Organizer with required profile fields.

  • Constructor Details

    • Organizer

      public Organizer()
      Default no-argument constructor required for Firebase deserialization.

    • Organizer

      public Organizer(String deviceId, String name, String email, String phoneNumber)
      Constructs an Organizer with required profile fields.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the unique device identifier for this user
      name - the full name of the organizer
      email - the email address of the organizer
      phoneNumber - the optional phone number of the organizer (pass null if not provided)

  • Method Details

    • addEvent

      public void addEvent(String eventId)
      Adds an event to this organizer's list of organized events. Does nothing if the event ID is already in the list.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the ID of the event to add

    • removeEvent

      public void removeEvent(String eventId)
      Removes an event from this organizer's list of organized events. Does nothing if the event ID is not in the list.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the ID of the event to remove

    • hasEvent

      public boolean hasEvent(String eventId)
      Returns whether this organizer owns the given event.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the ID of the event to check
      Returns:
      true if the organizer owns the event, false otherwise

    • getOrganizedEventIds

      public List<String> getOrganizedEventIds()
      Returns the list of event IDs this organizer has created.
      Returns:
      list of organized event IDs

    • setOrganizedEventIds

      public void setOrganizedEventIds(List<String> organizedEventIds)
      Sets the list of event IDs this organizer has created.
      Parameters:
      organizedEventIds - the list of event IDs to assign
